summary_one_line: Input must place the 4-byte ASCII literal 'trak' as a table tag so the font carries an AAT track table and apply_trak becomes true.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font containing a table directory entry whose 4-byte tag equals the ASCII bytes 74 72 61 6b ('trak'), so that apply_trak is set and the true branch at hb-ot-shape.cc:278 is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries the exact bytes 74 72 61 6b ('trak') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f (BYTE DIFF shows W bytes 74(t)/72(r)/61(a)/6b(k) at those four offsets in 9 of 10 winners), supplying the table tag that drives apply_trak true; the winner resolves 10/10 with avg hitcount 116 on the branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry unrelated bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x0f (e.g. 00/01/2c/2b and 20/18/08/fb in BYTE DIFF), never the 'trak' tag, so apply_trak stays false and the loser blocks 10/10 with hitcount 0 on the branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace to the mutation stack; the CmpLogObserver captures the comparison of the parsed table tag against the constant 'trak' and substitutes the captured operand into the input, synthesizing the exact 4-byte tag that plain value_profile (havoc and distance-bucket feedback only, no I2SRandReplace) cannot assemble in one step. Lineage of winner seed 3f368b250ab4cc50 shows dash-row I2S-floor ancestors at depth 5 and 6.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is the true side of 'if (this->apply_trak)' which guards the AAT track-table application.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with delta I2S, prob_div 1.00.
Winner-resolving seeds contain the ASCII literal 'trak' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f.
Across winners, offsets 0x0c-0x0f are concentrated on the t/r/a/k bytes while losers carry unrelated bytes there.
The winner resolves all trials and hits the branch many times while the loser never resolves and never hits.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=116  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks the I2SRandReplace mutator that performs comparison-operand substitution.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the havoc/token stack.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5720 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 3f368b250ab4cc50` and observed I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 5 and 6 of the ancestor chain, the floor signal characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A run where value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch on inputs that never contain the 'trak' tag at the table-tag offset, or where value_profile resolves it at the same rate as vpc despite lacking I2SRandReplace.

weakest_evidence_point: The mapping from input offset 0x0c-0x0f to the parsed table-directory tag is inferred from byte coincidence and source, not confirmed by an explicit CMP-operand log against the 'trak' constant.
